name: Flesh to Stone
description: You attempt to turn one creature that you can see within range into stone. If the target's body is made of flesh, it must make a Constitution saving throw. On a failed save, it has the Restrained condition as its flesh begins to harden. On a successful save, the creature isn't affected. A creature Restrained by this spell must make another Constitution saving throw at the end of each of its turns. If it successfully saves against this spell three times, the spell ends. If it fails its saves three times, it turns to stone and has the Petrified condition for the duration. The successes and failures don't need to be consecutive; keep track of both. If the petrification lasts for the full duration, it's permanent.
